design_strategy.identity: The Modern Digital Coop - Scandi-Rustic Dark Mode
design_strategy.core_philosophy: Digital Farmhouse: Where rustic warmth meets SaaS precision. Eliminate the 'amateur hobbyist' feel by using professional typography, deep contrast, and structured data visualization.
design_strategy.target_audience: Swedish hobby farmers (30-60yo) who want their tools to feel as premium as their produce.
design_strategy.theme_strategy: Nordic Noir: Deep charcoal backgrounds instead of pure black. Warm amber and wood tones for accents to evoke a coop's warmth in winter.

rules.data_labels: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500 font-semibold

usage_rules.gradients: Avoid generic gradients. Use subtle radial gradients for 'spotlight' effects on key metrics.

responsive_rules.desktop: 12-column grid. Key stats span 3 cols, Main chart spans 8 or 9 cols, Side panels span 3 or 4 cols.

Card.style: rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm hover:border-slate-700 transition-all duration-300
Card.instruction: Refactor raw divs with class 'card' or inline styles to Shadcn Card component.

Button.instruction: Replace html <button> with Shadcn Button. Use 'default' variant for primary actions (Egg Log), 'outline' for filters.

Dialog.instruction: Use for 'Egg Registration' and 'Daily Summary' popups instead of custom modals.

Chart.instruction: Use Recharts (already in package.json) but styled with the new color palette. Remove default grid lines or make them extremely subtle (#334155). Tooltips must be dark with amber accents.

Navigation.style: Sidebar on desktop (fixed left), Bottom Tab Bar on mobile (fixed bottom). Glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-md) required for sticky navs.

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a very subtle 'noise' texture overlay to the main background to reduce digital flatness and enhance the rustic feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The current codebase uses raw CSS and inline styles in /app/webapp. You MUST refactor this to use Tailwind CSS.
STEP 1: Install Tailwind CSS and its dependencies (postcss, autoprefixer) in /app/webapp.
STEP 3: Add the Tailwind directives to a new /app/webapp/src/index.css file (or replace existing css).
STEP 4: Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' for class handling.
STEP 5: Create a 'lib/utils.ts' file for the cn() utility function.
STEP 6: Systematically replace inline styles (style={{...}}) with Tailwind classes based on the Design Strategy above.
STEP 7: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
STEP 8: Ensure 'Young Serif' and 'Inter' fonts are imported in index.html or css.
NOTE: Do not try to run the Expo app in /app/frontend. Focus strictly on /app/webapp.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs) for testing.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.design_philosophy: Avoid generic 'Bootstrap' looks. Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) and deep contrast. No 100% pure blacks, always tinted (slate-950).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.interactions: All interactive elements must have :hover and :active states. Buttons should scale down slightly (scale-95) on click.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios are met. Use text-slate-400 for secondary text on slate-900 backgrounds, not darker.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.motion: Use smooth transitions (transition-all duration-200) for hover effects. Avoid instant color changes.
